title: ranunculus acris subsp. hultenii
intro: Ranunculus acris subsp. hultenii is a subspecies of the plant Ranunculus acris, commonly known as the early buttercup, a flowering plant in the family Ranunculaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its roots and flowers. The health benefits of Ranunculus acris subsp. hultenii include its potential to reduce inflammation and treat wounds, as well as its use as a diuretic and to treat respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
